name: Eggs in Potato Nests
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the mashed potatoes into four portions and place each on a baking sheet.
2. Shape each portion into a nest (cup shape) using a spoon.
3. Brush the nests with the beaten egg to glaze them.
4. Spoon 1/4 of the ham into each nest.
5. Break an egg into a cup, then gently place it in each nest.
6. Pour a little light cream over each nest to cover the egg.
7. Dot each nest with margarine.
